meta_data.format_citation: Zhou, X., & Stephens, M. (2012). Genome-wide efficient mixed-model analysis for association studies. Nature Genetics, 44(7), 821-824.
meta_data.format_comment: GEMMA univariate linear mixed model (LMM) output format. Columns: chr, rs, ps, n_miss, allele1, allele0, af, beta, se, l_remle, p_wald. The output is tab-separated. allele1 is the effect allele, allele0 is the non-effect allele, af is the allele frequency of allele1, and l_remle is the log-likelihood ratio test statistic.
